name: Deferred - Rival - 1
description: First returns for old rivals from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] A rival from {origin} discovered that comparison had not yet exhausted its uses.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer rival 2 1d6] Someone who had measured themselves against you in {origin} returned to take the comparison further.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] The old rivalry from {origin} found fresh life when one of you began to prosper more visibly.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] A former competitor from {origin} reappeared with exactly the same vanity and slightly better timing.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer rival 2 1d6] Someone first set against you in {origin} had not grown out of the habit.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] The contest begun in {origin} returned not because it mattered, but because neither of you had learned to let it stop.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] A rival from {origin} found a new arena in which to continue the old comparison.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer rival 2 1d6] Someone tied to {sourceTitle} proved unable to leave the old contest in its proper decade.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] The old rivalry from {origin} sharpened again when your names began appearing in the same conversations.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] A competitor from {origin} resumed the old contest with the confidence of someone who had rehearsed your future place beneath them.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer rival 2 1d6] The rivalry from {origin} returned in subtler form, which made it no less real.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] Someone who had once lost to you in {origin} now intended to correct the memory.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] The old comparison from {origin} became relevant again the moment it could become inconvenient.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer rival 2 1d6] A rival from {origin} let it be known that they still preferred the world arranged with you beneath them.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] An old competitor from {origin} returned because rivalry had become one of the few things either of you understood cleanly.
results.name: rival-1

results.description: [defer rival 2 1d6] The rivalry from {origin} found one more breath just when you might have hoped it was buried.
results.name: rival-1
